requirement_topic.en: Import Permit — Myanmar Investment Commission (MIC) and Customs Clearance
requirement_topic.zh: 进口许可——缅甸投资委员会（MIC）及清关
requirement_topic.zht: 進口許可——緬甸投資委員會（MIC）及清關

summary.en: Commercial importation of PV inverters into Myanmar requires an import licence / permit issued by the Ministry of Commerce (MoC) and, for foreign-invested projects, endorsement or permit from the Myanmar Investment Commission (MIC) under the Myanmar Investment Law 2016. Customs clearance is handled primarily at Yangon (Thilawa) port or Mandalay overland border crossings. Required import documentation typically includes: commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading/airway bill, certificate of origin (Form D for ASEAN FTA preferential tariff if applicable), technical specification sheet, and relevant conformity test reports (IEC-based). HS code classification determines the applicable import duty rate; PV inverters generally fall under HS 8504 (electrical transformers, static converters, inductors). Customs valuation is based on CIF value. Myanmar applies ASEAN Common Effective Preferential Tariff (CEPT) rates for ASEAN-origin goods; Chinese goods may attract standard MFN tariff rates unless qualifying under ASEAN-China FTA (ACFTA) with Form E certificate of origin.
summary.zh: 向缅甸商业进口光伏逆变器须持有商务部（MoC）签发的进口许可证；对于外商投资项目，还须获得缅甸投资委员会（MIC）依据2016年缅甸投资法的批准或许可。清关主要在仰光（迪拉瓦）港口或曼德勒陆路口岸办理。通常所需进口文件包括：商业发票、装箱单、提单/航空运单、原产地证明（如适用ASEAN自由贸易协定优惠关税，需提交Form D）、技术规格表及相关合规测试报告（基于IEC）。HS编码分类决定适用的进口关税税率；光伏逆变器一般归入HS 8504（变压器、静态变换器、电感器）。海关估价基于CIF价格。缅甸对ASEAN原产地货物适用ASEAN共同有效优惠关税（CEPT）税率；中国货物可能适用标准最惠国关税税率，除非凭Form E原产地证书符合ASEAN-中国自由贸易协定（ACFTA）资格。
summary.zht: 向緬甸商業進口光伏逆變器須持有商務部（MoC）簽發的進口許可證；對於外商投資項目，還須獲得緬甸投資委員會（MIC）依據2016年緬甸投資法的批准或許可。清關主要在仰光（迪拉瓦）港口或曼德勒陸路口岸辦理。通常所需進口文件包括：商業發票、裝箱單、提單/航空運單、原產地證明（如適用ASEAN自由貿易協定優惠關稅，需提交Form D）、技術規格表及相關合規測試報告（基於IEC）。HS編碼分類決定適用的進口關稅稅率；光伏逆變器一般歸入HS 8504（變壓器、靜態變換器、電感器）。海關估價基於CIF價格。緬甸對ASEAN原產地貨物適用ASEAN共同有效優惠關稅（CEPT）稅率；中國貨物可能適用標準最惠國關稅稅率，除非憑Form E原產地證書符合ASEAN-中國自由貿易協定（ACFTA）資格。

standards_or_laws: Myanmar Investment Law 2016 (Union Parliament Law No. 40/2016) — MIC permit requirements for foreign-invested imports
Myanmar Customs Law and import licensing rules (Ministry of Commerce)
ASEAN-China Free Trade Agreement (ACFTA) — Form E certificate of origin for preferential tariff
HS Chapter 85, heading 8504 — electrical transformers, static converters, inductors (applicable to PV inverters)

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter exports are managed under China's Customs Law and export licensing framework administered by the General Administration of Customs (GAC) and Ministry of Commerce (MOFCOM). Standard export documentation for PV inverters includes: commercial invoice, packing list, export customs declaration, bill of lading, and certificate of origin (Form E for ACFTA). China does not impose export licensing or quota restrictions on PV inverters under HS 8504 as a standard commercial product. Form E (ACFTA certificate of origin) can be issued by China Council for the Promotion of International Trade (CCPIT) or authorised local Customs authorities, enabling reduced import duty rates in ACFTA member countries including Myanmar.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器出口依据中国海关法和MOFCOM/GAC管理的出口许可框架进行。光伏逆变器标准出口文件包括：商业发票、装箱单、出口报关单、提单及原产地证书（ACFTA的Form E）。中国对HS 8504项下光伏逆变器作为标准商品不实施出口许可或配额限制。Form E（ACFTA原产地证书）可由中国国际贸易促进委员会（CCPIT）或经授权的当地海关机构签发，使缅甸等ACFTA成员国能够享受降低的进口关税税率。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器出口依據中國海關法和MOFCOM/GAC管理的出口許可框架進行。光伏逆變器標準出口文件包括：商業發票、裝箱單、出口報關單、提單及原產地證書（ACFTA的Form E）。中國對HS 8504項下光伏逆變器作為標準商品不實施出口許可或配額限制。Form E（ACFTA原產地證書）可由中國國際貿易促進委員會（CCPIT）或經授權的當地海關機構簽發，使緬甸等ACFTA成員國能夠享受降低的進口關稅稅率。

standards_or_laws: China Customs Law (海关法) — export declaration and documentation
ACFTA Form E certificate of origin — issued by CCPIT or authorised Customs authority

gap.en: The primary gap is Myanmar-side import permit complexity: MIC involvement, Ministry of Commerce import licensing, and MEPE project-level grid approval are separate administrative processes that must be completed in parallel or sequence before the goods can be cleared and connected. Chinese exporters familiar with EU or US export processes will find Myanmar's import permit framework less codified and more relationship-dependent. Practical advice: engage a licensed Myanmar customs broker and local solar-project agent early. Form E (ACFTA) is a significant commercial advantage — Chinese-origin PV inverters qualifying under ACFTA receive preferential tariff treatment over non-ASEAN, non-FTA competitors.
gap.zh: 主要差距在于缅甸进口许可的复杂性：MIC介入、商务部进口许可和MEPE项目层面并网审批是相互独立的行政流程，须在货物通关和并网前并行或顺序完成。熟悉欧美出口流程的中国出口商会发现缅甸进口许可框架成文程度较低，更依赖关系维护。实际建议：尽早委托持牌缅甸报关行和当地太阳能项目代理。Form E（ACFTA）是重要的商业优势——符合ACFTA资格的中国原产地光伏逆变器可享受比非ASEAN、非FTA竞争对手更优惠的关税待遇。
gap.zht: 主要差距在於緬甸進口許可的複雜性：MIC介入、商務部進口許可和MEPE項目層面並網審批是相互獨立的行政流程，須在貨物通關和並網前並行或順序完成。熟悉歐美出口流程的中國出口商會發現緬甸進口許可框架成文程度較低，更依賴關係維護。實際建議：儘早委託持牌緬甸報關行和當地太陽能項目代理。Form E（ACFTA）是重要的商業優勢——符合ACFTA資格的中國原產地光伏逆變器可享受比非ASEAN、非FTA競爭對手更優惠的關稅待遇。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — import licence from Ministry of Commerce required; MIC endorsement required for foreign-invested projects. ACFTA Form E is optional but commercially advantageous.
mandatory_status.cn: Standard export documentation is mandatory under China Customs Law. Form E is optional but commercially recommended for ACFTA preferential access.

source.publisher: Myanmar Investment Commission (MIC), Ministry of Investment and Foreign Economic Relations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Myanmar import of PV inverters requires a Ministry of Commerce import licence and MIC engagement for foreign-invested projects. Customs clearance at Yangon/Thilawa or Mandalay requires standard trade documents plus technical specifications. Obtain Form E (ACFTA) from CCPIT or authorised Chinese customs authority to access preferential tariff rates. Engage a licensed local customs broker. This comparison is informational only.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 向缅甸进口光伏逆变器须持有商务部进口许可证，外商投资项目须与MIC沟通。在仰光/迪拉瓦或曼德勒清关需提供标准贸易文件及技术规格。向CCPIT或经授权的中国海关机构申请Form E（ACFTA）以享受优惠关税税率。委托持牌当地报关行。本比较仅供参考。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 向緬甸進口光伏逆變器須持有商務部進口許可證，外商投資項目須與MIC溝通。在仰光/迪拉瓦或曼德勒清關需提供標準貿易文件及技術規格。向CCPIT或經授權的中國海關機構申請Form E（ACFTA）以享受優惠關稅稅率。委託持牌當地報關行。本比較僅供參考。

requirement_topic.en: RoHS / Hazardous Substance Restrictions — Myanmar Position
requirement_topic.zh: RoHS/有害物质限制——缅甸立场
requirement_topic.zht: RoHS/有害物質限制——緬甸立場

summary.en: Myanmar has no enacted mandatory horizontal restriction-of-hazardous-substances (RoHS) legislation equivalent to EU Directive 2011/65/EU (RoHS 2) or China's SJ/T 11363 / GB/T 26572 framework. As of the access date, no Myanmar-specific RoHS-equivalent law for electrical and electronic equipment has been identified in publicly available official sources. Environmental regulations exist (Environmental Conservation Law 2012, managed by the Ministry of Natural Resources and Environmental Conservation — MONREC) but do not impose product-level hazardous substance restrictions on imported electronics. This means the EU RoHS-compliance documentation that Chinese PV inverter exporters prepare for European markets has no direct Myanmar regulatory counterpart — it is not a barrier but also not a verifiable compliance requirement for Myanmar import clearance.
summary.zh: 缅甸没有颁布与EU指令2011/65/EU（RoHS 2）或中国SJ/T 11363/GB/T 26572框架等同的强制性横向有害物质限制（RoHS）立法。截至查询日期，在公开的官方来源中尚未发现缅甸针对电气电子设备的RoHS等效法律。环境法规虽然存在（2012年《环境保护法》，由自然资源与环境保护部MONREC管理），但未对进口电子产品设置产品层面的有害物质限制。这意味着中国光伏逆变器出口商为欧洲市场准备的EU RoHS合规文件在缅甸没有对应的监管要求——既不构成障碍，也不是缅甸进口清关的可验证合规要求。
summary.zht: 緬甸沒有頒布與EU指令2011/65/EU（RoHS 2）或中國SJ/T 11363/GB/T 26572框架等同的強制性橫向有害物質限制（RoHS）立法。截至查詢日期，在公開的官方來源中尚未發現緬甸針對電氣電子設備的RoHS等效法律。環境法規雖然存在（2012年《環境保護法》，由自然資源與環境保護部MONREC管理），但未對進口電子產品設置產品層面的有害物質限制。這意味著中國光伏逆變器出口商為歐洲市場準備的EU RoHS合規文件在緬甸沒有對應的監管要求——既不構成障礙，也不是緬甸進口清關的可驗證合規要求。

standards_or_laws: Myanmar Environmental Conservation Law 2012 (general environmental framework — no product-level hazardous substance restrictions for electronics identified)
No Myanmar RoHS-equivalent legislation identified as of access date

summary.en: China operates a mandatory hazardous substance disclosure and restriction framework for electronic information products under SJ/T 11364-2014 (marking standard for restriction of hazardous substances in EEE) and GB/T 26572-2011 (requirements for concentration limits of restricted substances). PV inverters exported from China carry the 'China RoHS' environmental information label per SJ/T 11364, disclosing the presence or absence of restricted substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr VI, PBBs, PBDEs). This China RoHS documentation is prepared for Chinese domestic market compliance and has no direct regulatory applicability to Myanmar — it remains a supply-chain transparency record rather than a Myanmar import requirement.
summary.zh: 中国对电子信息产品依据SJ/T 11364-2014（电子电气产品有害物质限制标识标准）和GB/T 26572-2011（限制物质浓度限量要求）实施强制性有害物质披露和限制框架。从中国出口的光伏逆变器依据SJ/T 11364加贴「中国RoHS」环保信息标识，披露限制物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、多溴联苯、多溴二苯醚）的含有情况。该中国RoHS文件是为满足中国国内市场合规要求而准备的，对缅甸没有直接的监管适用性——它作为供应链透明度记录存在，而非缅甸进口要求。
summary.zht: 中國對電子信息產品依據SJ/T 11364-2014（電子電氣產品有害物質限制標識標準）和GB/T 26572-2011（限制物質濃度限量要求）實施強制性有害物質披露和限制框架。從中國出口的光伏逆變器依據SJ/T 11364加貼「中國RoHS」環保信息標識，披露限制物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、多溴聯苯、多溴二苯醚）的含有情況。該中國RoHS文件是為滿足中國國內市場合規要求而準備的，對緬甸沒有直接的監管適用性——它作為供應鏈透明度記錄存在，而非緬甸進口要求。

standards_or_laws: SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for restriction of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (China RoHS marking)
GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits on restricted substances in electronic and electrical products

gap.en: Myanmar has no RoHS-equivalent law — this is a neutral gap, not a barrier. Chinese PV inverter exporters do not need to prepare Myanmar-specific hazardous substance documentation because no such requirement exists. The existing China RoHS label and documentation from the domestic supply chain provides supply-chain transparency but carries no additional compliance obligation in Myanmar. Exporters should note that this may change if Myanmar aligns its electronics environmental regulations with ASEAN frameworks in the future — monitor MONREC and ASEAN EEE working group publications.
gap.zh: 缅甸没有RoHS等效法律——这是一个中性差距，而非障碍。中国光伏逆变器出口商无需为缅甸准备专项有害物质文件，因为不存在此类要求。现有国内供应链中的中国RoHS标识和文件提供供应链透明度，但在缅甸不产生额外合规义务。出口商应注意，若缅甸未来将其电子产品环境法规与ASEAN框架对齐，情况可能发生变化——建议关注MONREC及ASEAN EEE工作组的最新发布。
gap.zht: 緬甸沒有RoHS等效法律——這是一個中性差距，而非障礙。中國光伏逆變器出口商無需為緬甸準備專項有害物質文件，因為不存在此類要求。現有國內供應鏈中的中國RoHS標識和文件提供供應鏈透明度，但在緬甸不產生額外合規義務。出口商應注意，若緬甸未來將其電子產品環境法規與ASEAN框架對齊，情況可能發生變化——建議關注MONREC及ASEAN EEE工作組的最新發布。

mandatory_status.target: No mandatory RoHS-equivalent legislation identified in Myanmar as of access date. Not a compliance barrier.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SJ/T 11364-2014 hazardous substance marking is required for electronic products sold in China (applies domestically; not a Myanmar export requirement).

source.publisher: Ministry of Natural Resources and Environmental Conservation (MONREC), Myanmar

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Myanmar has no enacted mandatory RoHS-equivalent legislation for PV inverters as of the access date. Chinese exporters do not need to prepare Myanmar-specific hazardous substance documentation. The absence of a Myanmar RoHS law is a neutral finding — not a compliance gap requiring action, but subject to change if Myanmar aligns with future ASEAN EEE environmental frameworks.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至查询日期，缅甸尚无针对光伏逆变器的强制性RoHS等效立法。中国出口商无需为缅甸准备专项有害物质文件。缅甸没有RoHS法律是一个中性发现——不是需要采取行动的合规差距，但若缅甸未来与ASEAN EEE环境框架对齐，情况可能发生变化。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至查詢日期，緬甸尚無針對光伏逆變器的強制性RoHS等效立法。中國出口商無需為緬甸準備專項有害物質文件。緬甸沒有RoHS法律是一個中性發現——不是需要採取行動的合規差距，但若緬甸未來與ASEAN EEE環境框架對齊，情況可能發生變化。
